core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Blend community warmth (Ajo) with strict financial structural grids.
Emotion First: The platform must evoke Trust, Community, and Growth. Not just raw data.
Negative Space: Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) to reduce financial cognitive load.
Contrast: Soft backgrounds with sharp 1px borders and high-contrast typography.

cards.style: Neumorphism (Tactile) Variant: Flat background (#F4F1EA) on (#FDFBF7), 1px solid border-black/5, subtle shadow-sm. No heavy box-shadows. Sharp 4px or 8px border-radius max.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3F33] text-white hover:bg-[#152e25] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1E3F33] text-[#1E3F33] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3

tables.style: Cardless, dense layout. Zebra striping using transparent and #F4F1EA. Right-aligned numbers. Sticky headers with backdrop-blur.

layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Dense data correlation.
layout_spacing.marketing_grid: The 'Bento' Grid: Asymmetrical spans, gap-8 to gap-12, overlapping sections.
layout_spacing.padding_philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for sections. 2-3x typical spacing.

hero_image.description: African community sitting together outdoors, representing the 'Ajo' communal aspect. Apply bg-black/30 overlay if text is on top.

feature_image.description: Person using phone and card, representing seamless financial transactions.

logo_icon.description: Minimalist geometric concentric green circles logo representing cyclical community finance.

payout_celebration_bg.description: Abstract vibrant pattern to be used as a subtle background for 'Payout Eligible/Completed' cards.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must use distinct text colors on hover. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C05A3A].
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. NO universal transition: all.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Hover slight lift (-translate-y-1) for dashboard widgets.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-proof-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for forms, tables, dialogs (Receipt review modal), and dropdowns. Customize heavily to match the Organic & Earthy archetype (remove default borders/shadows, apply #F4F1EA surface color).
The Receipt Review Modal must display the image side-by-side with the approval form (Approve/Reject + Notes) using a grid-cols-2 layout.
For the 12 Monthly Status timelines, use a horizontal stepper or grid representation using the exact classes provided in 'status_badges'.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind (No Shadcn cards) for marketing sections to allow bento/asymmetrical grids.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Avoid importing other icon libraries unless strictly necessary.
The Monthly Contribution Tracker should be a dense Matrix (Members x Cycles). Use sticky headers and horizontal scroll. Right-align all currency.
Ensure the hero section uses the 'hero_image' URL with an overlay gradient.
